title: Elbaf’s Wounds Reopen
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Usopp, Unknown person #8, Children, Unknown person #9, Loki as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago - Ryugu Kingdom, Fishman Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HOH HOW HOW HOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Baraha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't laughed this hard in a long time, Neptune!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Me too, Pal-Jamon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We both have our fair share of headaches, don't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, I don't think your son is that bad, deep down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's not forget what your youth was like!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well, when you put it like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just being brutally honest!! Anyway, did I tell you a fortune-teller predicted I'd have a daughter in four years-jamon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the time is right, why don't we betrove LOKI to my future daughter!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Baraha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!! Now you're going too far!! But it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, don't write her off so fast, she's not gonna be just any old hermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My daughter might well be born with a power no one else could ever hope to handle Jamon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well now. That does sound like a perfect match!! Let's have a toast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here's to the futures of my mischieous troublemaker and your little Mosa-Mosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't call her that!! She won't be shaggy!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: THAT SAME YEAR - OML library, ElbAF

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mention it! You're welcome to live freely here. Saul.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thanks a bunch.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Actually, there's one thing I'd like to ask.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we get other learned folks on Elbaf to help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Would you be willing...

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: ...to open a school here?!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: A school, huh... that's a nice idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: 15 YEARS AGO...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A major incident occurred at the Holy Land of Mary Geoise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My slaves are running away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The cells are broken!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hurry!! or do you wanna be their pet forever?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: SHFT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn it!! Is that a God's Knight?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen, the armory will be left unlocked for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll tell you the location...

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
